dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7726 IH: No Funds for Repeat Child Care Violations Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Miller of Illinois introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Child Care and Development Block Grant Act of 1990 to withhold funds from noncompliant States under suchAct.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Funds for Repeat Child Care Violations Act.

section.header: Strengthening the authority to withhold funds for fraud
section.text: Section 658I(b)(2)(B) of the Child Care and Development Block Grant Act of 1990 (42 U.S.C. 9858g(b)(2)) is amended by striking Secretary may and inserting Secretary shall.
